rules.high: Dated historical dictionary with cited quotation, or readable dated primary-source text in the target sense.
rules.medium: Reliable dictionary/reference first-use year without visible quotation, or readable dated snippet with caution.
rules.low: Poor OCR, ambiguous sense, metadata-only evidence, secondary uncited source, or search lead only.

attestation_confidence.quality_reason: Reliable dictionary/reference claim or dated source that needs quotation/image verification.
